retrieved_result: Catalyst 6500 Release 12.2SX Software Configuration Guide This chapter describes how to configure IP Source Guard. Cisco IOS Release 12.2 (33)SXH and later releases support IP Source Guard. Note For complete syntax and usage information for the commands used in this chapter, see the Cisco IOS Master Command List, at this URL:http://www.cisco.com/en/US/docs
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Cisco IOS IP Source Guard configuration, not Docker setup for beginners.
